text:
pgollucci    2009-01-27 19:52:01 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/rsyslog4-snmp Makefile 
  Log:
  Rsyslog works based in input and output modules. The port sysutils/rsyslog4 brings
  the core modules for basic functionality.
  
  -snmp SNMP trap sending
  
  PR:                     ports/130046
  Submitted by:   Cristiano Rolim Pereira <cristianorolim at hotmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1072    +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/sysutils/rsyslog4-snmp/Makefile (new)
